facts: Repo is a ProPokerTV non-gambling poker media/creator/clips/community/contest/leaderboard platform.
Not-yet-finished items include refresh token rotation, integration tests, signed uploads, contest finalize job.
Weekly contest foundation is admin-created contest, nominated approved clips, one vote per user, winner by vote count.
locked_decisions: Approved nav: Home, League, Clips, Rankings, Calendar, Creators, Upload, Profile.
Profile becomes identity/reputation editor with six sections.
Calendar becomes first-class discovery/affiliate surface with non-gambling disclosure.
Visual direction remains Midnight Gold Editorial League.
Security baseline: ASVS L1 MVP with selected L2 controls.
recommended_next_action: PR 1: frontend-only navigation + profile UX + Calendar placeholder, preserving existing backend contracts.
fallback_action: PR 1a: add Calendar nav/route and premium account nav first; profile tabs next.

repo_health.status: improved if docs are placed under docs/project-source-of-truth
